steps.title: Identify the needed boundaries
steps.content: The first part announces that audio technologies allowed another instrument to join jazz and swing music. The blank must name that instrument and then start a new sentence describing it.

steps.title: Reject faulty punctuation
steps.content:
• Choice A: The comma creates a run-on between the instrument name and the next clause.
  • Choice B: The next sentence begins awkwardly with an appositive and no clear structure.
  • Choice C: A semicolon needs an independent clause after it, but the flute, a relatively quiet instrument is not one.

steps.title: Use colon plus sentence break
steps.content: A colon can introduce the named instrument, and a period then cleanly starts the sentence explaining why the flute became audible. The answer is D.
